problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix may resolve Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
